title: Command-generation extraction epic

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Extract command-generation as an independent maintainer dependency while AW remains the host for command meaning, generated outputs, and domain primitives.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep command-generation as a maintainer dependency only; AW remains the owner of AW command meaning, generated outputs, and runtime-boundary policy.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Implementation order, helper names, and validation tightening inside this lane.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The lane needs command semantic drift, runtime dependency drift, or files outside the declared owner surfaces.
canonical_core.next_action: Use the decomposition to execute dependency-ready child lanes #1202-#1208 and keep PR #1210 aligned with the extraction scope.
completion_criteria: All child lanes #1202-#1208 have owner surfaces, dependency order, and proof.
AW consumes command-generation as a maintainer dependency without shipping it at runtime.
Generic generator behavior lives in command-generation; AW-specific contracts and outputs remain in AW.

goal: Extract command-generation as an independent maintainer dependency while AW remains the host for command meaning, generated outputs, and domain primitives.
non_goals: Do not close #1201 from planning alone.
Do not move AW domain command meaning into command-generation.

intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: only when every child lane is proven

execution_bounds.allowed paths: pyproject.toml; uv.lock; scripts/generate/; scripts/check/; tests/test_command_generation_*.py; generated/*/python/; ../command-generation/src/command_generation/; ../command-generation/tests/; ../command-generation/README.md
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run pytest tests/test_command_generation_artifacts.py tests/test_command_generation_primitive_executor.py -q; uv --directory ../command-generation run pytest -q; uv build
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before changing command semantics, generated package layout, runtime dependency policy, or unrelated package internals.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated AW runtime behavior, unrelated package internals, or generated outputs not covered by freshness proof.
execution_bounds.max changed files: closed slice; no further writes expected without reopening a fresh plan.
